plan: 04-03 (deliverables landed) → 04-04 (NOT_STARTED, gated on model-zenoh) → 04-05 (NOT_STARTED, gated on 04-04)

completed_tasks.name: Phase 3 closed (cable physics + scoring publishers + object TF)
Phase 4 CONTEXT.md (--auto): 13 D-decisions across 6 gray areas
Phase 4 plans authored (5 plans + research + plan-checker PASSED)
Plan 04-01: pre-flight A2/A4 probes — A2=PASS (custom-msg humble subscriber), A4=MISMATCH (live spawn paths /World/TaskBoard/SCPort_0/NICCardMount_0/NICCard mismatch hardcoded _PORT_LINK_PATHS)
Plan 04-02: load_trial MCP atom (4-surface DX-02) + ground_truth kwarg + adapter helpers _extract_cable_kwargs + _dispatch_rail_block; audit_dx02 at 30 PRESENT atoms; 3 trials dispatch offline

Plan 04-03 deliverables: my-eval-isaac:v1 Docker image (DEPRECATED, archival) + run_aic_engine_against_isaac_sim.sh wrapper + D-13 1-surface setter (AicScoringPublishers.set_port_link_paths) + recursive PhysxContactReportAPI tag-walk fix + iter-4 fastrtps RMW blocker diagnosis + iter-5/6/7 host-build pivot

Host-build aic_engine + aic_adapter + aic_scoring + 4 interface packages against humble in ~/aic_humble_ws/. 5 source pivots captured in exts/aic-dt/source_pivots/ (gz_math_vendor→gz-math7, ScoringTier2 humble rosbag2 API, libfmt drop-in for std::format). aic_engine reaches 'Engine Stopped' with full lifecycle traversed (init → trial validate → reset → scoring summary). iter-4 fastrtps RMW blocker RESOLVED.

remaining_tasks.name: Commit uncommitted edits: 04-03-SUMMARY.md (iter-7 + new blocker section), dryrun_trial_1.txt (iter-5/6/7 + verdict), run_aic_engine_against_isaac_sim.sh (host-build pivot wrapper), config.json (workflow.use_worktrees=false), .planning/.user_pause deletion

Resolve downstream blocker: my-solution:v1 (CheatCode policy) requires zenoh transport (RMW=zenoh + AIC_ROUTER_ADDR). Host humble engine + kilted zenoh model can't see each other. 3 mitigation options identified (see blockers).
Plan 04-04: parity_report.py + dual JSON+MD output + first M1 ship-gate exercise (3 trials × 2 sims). Engine-side wrapper is ready (host-build pivot). Model side gated on model-zenoh-mitigation.
Plan 04-05: DX-05 README rewrite + CHANGELOG M1 + REQUIREMENTS flips + ROADMAP/STATE + 04-SUMMARY.md + conditional .m1_shipped touch (gated on 04-04 verdict=READY)
M1 ships: every sample_config.yaml trial passes against Isaac Sim with same outcome as Gazebo; touch .planning/.m1_shipped

blockers.title: kilted ↔ humble fastrtps type-hash incompatibility for stock /clock and /joint_states
blockers.resolution: Host-build pivot (commit 7943536). aic_engine + aic_adapter compiled into ~/aic_humble_ws/install/ against /opt/ros/humble. Wrapper updated to launch them as host processes. 5 source pivots captured in exts/aic-dt/source_pivots/.
blockers.verification: iter-7 trial_1 dry-run: aic_engine reaches 'Engine Stopped' after 70s lifecycle (init → validate → reset → scoring summary).

blockers.title: my-solution:v1 (CheatCode policy container) requires zenoh transport for service discovery
blockers.summary: After host-build resolves engine-side RMW interop, model container still exits immediately with `AIC_ROUTER_ADDR must be provided`. AIC competition stack uses zenoh router (port 7447) for cross-container model↔eval lifecycle. Source: ~/Documents/aic/scripts/run_cheatcode.sh:47-49. Host humble fastrtps engine + kilted zenoh model = no service discovery for /aic_model/get_state.
blockers.evidence: .planning/phases/04-trial-loader/dryrun_trial_1.txt — DRY-RUN VERDICT (host-build pivot) section: 'Model container started: FAIL (exits immediately: AIC_ROUTER_ADDR must be provided)'.
blockers.impact_on_phase_4: Plan 04-04 parity_report.py can run engine side cleanly (RMW interop resolved); CheatCode-driven trials cannot complete without model side. PARITY-07 live-fire still blocked. M1 ship gate (TRIAL-04) cannot close.
mitigation_options: (a) Stand up zenohd on host (binary ships in ~/Documents/aic/.pixi/envs/default/) + add fastdds↔zenoh bridge for engine ↔ model. ~30min infra. Risk: 'no bridges' architectural law spirit.

(b) Build aic_model + CheatCode policy humble-native (mirror the 04-03 pivot for the model side). Clone aic_example_policies + my-solution Dockerfile contents into a humble env or ~/aic_humble_ws. ~60-90min build. Cleanest M1 path; preserves architectural law. Risk: my-solution:v1 may have transitive zenoh deps in CheatCode.py itself.

(c) Stub lifecycle node mimicking aic_model's /aic_model/get_state + /aic_model/configure contract for PARITY-07 fire-test only. ~20min. Drives gripper toward port_1 deterministically; verifies /scoring/insertion_event fires; does NOT verify CheatCode trial outcome. Useful as a discriminator: if PARITY-07 fires under stub, the bug is in the model-zenoh path; if not, the bug is in the contact-pair plumbing.
blockers.user_decision_required: Which mitigation path. Recommendation: try (c) first as a 20-min discriminator, then commit to (b) for the M1 ship gate (preserves architectural law and mirrors the 04-03 pivot pattern).
what_works: Host humble aic_engine + aic_adapter (commit 7943536) — full lifecycle, /clock subscribed, 3 trials parsed
D-13 fallback: live port paths from spawned[] override hardcoded _PORT_LINK_PATHS
Recursive PhysxContactReportAPI tag-walk: 2 ports tagged (plug + sc_port_visual)
run_aic_engine_against_isaac_sim.sh wrapper invokes Isaac Sim + load_trial + host humble engine + adapter; only model container side fails

human_actions_pending.title: Pick mitigation path for model-zenoh blocker (a/b/c above)

decisions.decision: Phase 4 CONTEXT D-06 ('reuse aic_eval Docker, skip Gazebo bringup') was SUPERSEDED by RESEARCH.md finding (no start_gazebo:=false flag in aic_gz_bringup.launch.py).
decisions.rationale: Plan 04-03 first attempted derived my-eval-isaac:v1 Docker image (Option 4B from research). Then iter-4 surfaced fastrtps cross-distro type-hash incompat. Final pivot: host-build aic_engine + aic_adapter as native humble processes (mitigation option b from blocker). Cleanest path; preserves architectural law; no Docker for engine.

decisions.decision: D-13 set_port_link_paths is a 1-surface helper method (NOT a 4-surface MCP atom).
decisions.rationale: Per Plan 04-01 SUMMARY clarification: load_trial computes paths from spawn-atom call sites (/World/TaskBoard/SCPort_{i}, /World/TaskBoard/NICCardMount_{i}, /World/TaskBoard/NICCard) and passes via _start_aic_scoring_publishers(port_link_paths=...) kwarg. No new MCP atom needed.

decisions.decision: Wave 1 A2 'PASS' verdict was insufficient — only verified custom-built aic_control_interfaces (matched ABI by same-workspace build) and humble-side host subscriber. Did NOT exercise kilted-container ↔ humble-Isaac-Sim path for stock messages.
decisions.rationale: iter-4 dry-run revealed kilted container sees /clock in topic info but receives 0 messages. Lesson: future RMW interop probes must subscribe to a STOCK message type (sensor_msgs/JointState, rosgraph_msgs/Clock) from the OTHER end's distro, not just verify same-workspace custom messages.

next_action: User must pick model-zenoh mitigation path (a/b/c). Recommended sequence: (1) Try (c) stub lifecycle node as 20-min discriminator to verify PARITY-07 plumbing fires under deterministic plug-into-port drive. (2) If (c) PASSES, commit to (b) host-build aic_model + CheatCode humble-native for M1 ship gate. (3) Run Plan 04-04 parity_report.py once engine + model both run end-to-end. (4) Plan 04-05 closure + .m1_shipped touch.
context_notes: Phase 4 is 60% closed: 2 plans fully done, 1 plan with deliverables landed but downstream blocker, 2 plans gated. The architectural pattern proven by Plan 04-03 (host-build cross-distro packages against humble) is the template for resolving the model-zenoh blocker via mitigation (b). Engine-side success was hard-won (4 dry-run iterations, 5 source pivots). Cache snapshot at ~/.cache/ov/DerivedDataCache.bak.1777986848 (153.5MB).
